---
name: fix_project_errors
description: "Inspect this Flutter/Dart project for compile errors, lint issues, and configuration problems, then fix them across files."
---

Use this prompt when you want the assistant to perform a targeted project health check and apply safe fixes in the current Flutter project.

Example requests:
- "Check the project for Flutter compile errors and fix any issues."
- "Analyze Dart files and resolve warnings or analysis issues."
- "Inspect `pubspec.yaml`, `analysis_options.yaml`, and Android build settings for problems."
